privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for oracle_sql_developer_env manufacturing_spc_quality_analysis task by confirming that the measurement data is synthetically generated via PL/SQL in setup_task.sh. Verified that the embedded statistical signals exactly match the script logic: Line 1 Brake Rotor experiences a +0.020mm sudden mean shift, Line 2 Bearing Housing has a +0.0003mm/day gradual mean drift, and Line 3 Valve Spring has a standard deviation jump from 0.10 to 0.35. The required Oracle features (Analytical Functions, Materialized Views, ROLLUP/CUBE, PL/SQL) are correctly aligned with both the task description and verifier scripts.
